1A Term

  • Complete all the following:
    • MATH115 - Linear Algebra for Engineering (0.50)
    • MATH117 - Calculus 1 for Engineering (0.50)
    • SYDE101 - Communications in Systems Design Engineering-Written and Oral (0.25)
    • SYDE121 - Digital Computation (0.50)
    • SYDE151 - Introduction to Systems Thinking (0.50)
    • SYDE161 - Introduction to Design (0.50)

1B Term

  • Complete all the following:
    • MATH119 - Calculus 2 for Engineering (0.50)
    • SYDE101L - Communications in Systems Design Engineering-Visualization (0.25)
    • SYDE152 - Introduction to Ecological Systems (0.50)
    • SYDE162 - Human Factors in Design (0.50)
    • SYDE163 - Introduction to Design 2 (0.50)
    • SYDE181 - Physics 1: Statics (0.50)

2A Term

  • Complete all the following:
    • SYDE208 - Discrete Mathematics and Logic (0.50)
    • SYDE223 - Data Structures and Algorithms (0.50)
    • SYDE252 - Linear Systems and Signals (0.50)
    • SYDE261 - Culture of Design, Impacts (0.50)
    • SYDE263 - Engineering Prototyping (0.25)
    • SYDE288 - Physics 2: Dynamics (0.50)

2B Term

  • Complete all the following:
    • MATH218 - Differential Equations for Engineers (0.50)
    • SYDE192L - Digital Systems Laboratory (0.25)
    • SYDE212 - Probability, Statistics, and Data Science (0.50)
    • SYDE251 - Introduction to Socio-Ecological Systems (0.50)
    • SYDE264 - Needs Analysis and Prototyping (0.50)
    • SYDE292 - Circuits, Instrumentation, and Measurements (0.50)

3A Term

  • Complete all the following:
    • SYDE262 - Engineering Economics and Sustainability (0.50)
    • SYDE292L - Circuits, Instrumentation, and Measurements Laboratory (0.25)
    • SYDE321 - Introduction to Responsible Artificial Intelligence Systems (0.50)
    • SYDE351 - Systems Models 1 (0.50)
    • SYDE362 - Design Testing, Validation, and Verification (0.50)
    • SYDE385 - Material Properties (0.50)

3B Term

  • Complete all of the following
    • Complete all the following:
      • SYDE352 - Introduction to Control Systems (0.50)
      • SYDE352L - Control Systems Laboratory (0.25)
      • SYDE364 - Design Consultation (0.50)
      • SYDE382 - Multi-Physics Modelling and Simulation (0.50)
      • SYDE411 - Optimization and Numerical Methods (0.50)
    • Complete 1 approved elective

4A Term

  • Complete all of the following
    • Complete all the following:
      • SYDE400 - Work-Term Symposium Presentation (0.13)
      • SYDE461 - Systems Design Engineering Capstone Project 1 (0.50)
      • SYDE532 - Introduction to Complex Systems (0.50)
    • Complete 3 approved electives

4B Term

  • Complete all of the following
    • Complete all the following:
      • SYDE462 - Systems Design Engineering Capstone Project 2 (0.50)
    • Complete 4 approved electives
